summary: Added 2 missing tests to test/code-timeout.test.ts (Pyodide browser timeout + fast code within timeout). Streaming tests (16) already existed in test/streaming.test.ts. All 27 tests pass (16 streaming + 11 timeout). Note: test/ask-stream.test.ts has 10 pre-existing failures from agentic-core mock issues, unrelated to this task.
